question:
Portsmouth FC vs. Millwall FC: Both Teams to Score

Description: In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Portsmouth FC and Millwall FC, scheduled for November 22 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Portsmouth FC and Millwall FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.efl.com/

It meant Portsmouth have still only scored 10 times in the league this season and have just a single win in nine, with Wrexham losing only once in nine league outings to sit 14th.
